_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Facilitate access enabling by physical and/or wireless means.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data platform access management processes, including access request intake, provisioning workflows, access review cycles, and deprovisioning procedures.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.424), DA-T-010 (DA, cosine: 0.408).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.3/10 (raw 0.334). Shared vocabulary: [access]. DCWF-only terms [enabling, facilitate, means, physical, wireless] vs WIDAI-only terms [cycles, data, deprovisioning, intake, knowledge, management] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.838 (P=0.842, R=0.834). Balanced P/R — the 8-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Facilitate access enabling by physical and/or wireless means." and "Knowledge of data platform access management processes, including access request" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.434 > STS 0.334 (gap +0.100). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [access] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [access]. DCWF-only: [enabling, facilitate, means, physical, wireless]. WIDAI-only: [cycles, data, deprovisioning, intake, knowledge, management].
